name: Grand Canyon Education, Inc.
business: Grand Canyon Education, Inc. provides education services to colleges and universities, including technology, academic, marketing, counseling, and back-office support. Its most significant partner is Grand Canyon University, and as of December 31, 2025, it serves 20 university partners with over 136,200 students.

exposures.sentence: We provide cybersecurity services, support and incident response for all infrastructure and software that we utilize.
GCE has developed a suite of AI tools, including its proprietary Mosaic platform, which provides centralized, secure, and permission-based access for students, faculty, and staff.
